bird.name: Rufous-sided honeyeater
bird.summary: The rufous-sided honeyeater (Ptiloprora erythropleura) is a species of bird in the family Meliphagidae. It is endemic to West Papua, Indone…

relations.evidence: |last2=Christidis |first2=Les |last3=Ford |first3=Hugh |date=2020 |title=Rufous-sided Honeyeater (Ptiloprora erythropleura), version 1.0 |url=https://birdsoftheworld.org/bow/species/rushon1/1.0/introduction |journal=Birds of the World |language=en |doi=10.2173/bow.rushon1.01 |issn=2771-3105|url-access=subscription }} Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist montane forests
